name: Aion World Atreia RPG
description:
Embark on an epic journey in Atreia, a shattered world born by the deity Aion, where the Tower of Eternity once united all life.

After the Epic Cataclysm split the planet, two races emerged: radiant Elyos in sunlit Elysea and fierce Asmodians in dark Asmodae, locked in eternal war with the draconic Balaur in the chaotic Abyss and wild Balaurea.Races: Choose Elyos (angelic, proud) or Asmodian (demonic, vengeful).

Classes: Pick a path—Warrior, Scout, Mage, Priest, Technist, or Muse—unlocking sub-classes like Templar, Assassin, Sorcerer, or Songweaver through Ascension.

Cities: Explore capitals (Sanctum for Elyos, Pandaemonium for Asmodians), regional hubs (Verteron, Morheim), and contested zones like Reshanta’s Abyss or Balaurea’s ruins.

Gameplay: Undertake quests, battle in PvPvE wars, conquer fortresses, and craft gear (Cloth, Leather, Chain, Plate) to earn titles, ranks, and immortality.

[Awaken, Daeva! Choose your race and class, then forge your legend in a world of endless strife. Reply to begin.]

World SystemAtreia operates on Aether-infused mechanics:Progression: Daevas start mortal, ascending at level 10 via quests for wings and immortality.

Levels (1-80+) gained through quests, combat, and crafting. Death resurrects at Obelisks with minor penalties.

Combat: Real-time, aerial fights with skills, combos, and flight.

Aether enables gliding, transformations, and summons. PvP in rifts/Abyss; PvE against mobs/Balaur.

Economy/Crafting: Gather resources (Aether extraction, mining) to craft gear.

Currency: Kinah (gold), Abyss Points for ranks/titles. Gear types: Cloth (light, magic-focused), Leather (agile, scout-suited), Chain (balanced, priest-friendly), Plate (heavy, warrior-armored).

Social/Legions: Join Legions (guilds) for group quests, sieges. Alliances form for raids.
creator: allen walker
